message:
test(config): add PolicyRule/PolicyRuleMatch/PolicyRuleDecision proptest coverage

6 new property tests in proptest_config.rs (83→89):
- PolicyRuleDecision serde JSON roundtrip
- PolicyRuleMatch serde JSON roundtrip (all 9 fields)
- PolicyRule serde JSON roundtrip (id/desc/priority/decision/message/match)
- PolicyRuleMatch::default() is empty across all fields
- PolicyRuleMatch::specificity() is non-negative (exercised)
- PolicyRuleMatch::specificity() bounded ≤ 11

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
